---
title: "Final Project"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#scatterplot
ggplot(data, aes(x = G, y = W)) +
  geom_point(color = "darkblue", alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = "Wins vs Games Played (2013–2024)",
    x = "Games Played",
    y = "Wins",
    caption = "Each point represents one team in one season"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

#boxplot
ggplot(data, aes(x = factor(YEAR), y = W)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightgreen", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Boxplot of Wins by Year (2013–2024)",
       x = "Season",
       y = "Wins") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
